summary: Configurable PID controller algorithm for closed-loop control applications.
c_init_template: PID_Init(&[[module_identifier]], APP_PID_KP, APP_PID_KI, APP_PID_KD, APP_PID_OUT_MIN, APP_PID_OUT_MAX);

sample_time_ms.description: Control loop sample period in milliseconds

basic_control_loop.description: Basic PID control loop: read sensor → compute → apply actuator
init: PID_Init(&pid, APP_PID_KP, APP_PID_KI, APP_PID_KD, APP_PID_OUT_MIN, APP_PID_OUT_MAX);

notes: This is a software-only algorithm module with no hardware resource requirements.
PID parameters (Kp, Ki, Kd) MUST be tuned on real hardware — defaults are starting points only.
The integral term includes anti-windup clamping based on output limits.
Call PID_Compute at a fixed rate for stable control behavior.
sources: Standard PID control algorithm with anti-windup
Brett Beauregard PID library design reference
